name: Candied Yams
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Firmly Packed Brown Sugar, or Vegetarian Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place potatoes in a large Dutch oven and cover with water. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes. Drain and let cool.
3. Peel and slice the potatoes. Layer slices in a 13x9" baking dish coated with cooking spray. Combine sugar and the next five ingredients; stir well. Drizzle syrup over potatoes.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until tender. Spoon syrup over potatoes before serving.
Yield: 7 servings
Serving Size: 1 cup
Points: 4
Exchanges: 3 1/2 Starch
